evals.name: decrypt-file-stdout
evals.prompt: Decrypt the file /tmp/secret.enc that was encrypted with KMS envelope encryption, output the plaintext to stdout
evals.expected_output: Original plaintext printed to stdout, KMS Decrypt API call succeeds

evals.name: decrypt-string-input
evals.prompt: Decrypt this envelope ciphertext: <3-line base64 output from encrypt>

evals.name: decrypt-with-context
evals.prompt: Decrypt /tmp/secret.enc that was encrypted with encryption context {"app":"billing"} using the same context
evals.expected_output: Plaintext recovered, EncryptionContext passed to KMS Decrypt API

evals.name: decrypt-stdin-stdout
evals.prompt: Read envelope ciphertext from stdin and output decrypted plaintext to stdout

evals.name: decrypt-wrong-context-fails
evals.prompt: Try to decrypt /tmp/secret.enc with encryption context {"app":"wrong"} when it was encrypted with {"app":"billing"}
evals.expected_output: KMS Decrypt fails with mismatch error, no plaintext output
